name: Hershey's Cocoa Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: Baked 9-inch pie crust or Graham cracker crust, cooled
recipeInstructions:
In a medium saucepan, combine cocoa, sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Gradually stir in milk until smooth. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils. Boil for one minute. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla. Pour into prepared pie crust. Carefully press plastic wrap onto the filling. Refrigerate 6 to 8 hours. Top with whipped cream. Cover; refrigerate leftover pie. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
